name: Ramesh Prasad Sharma
bio: With over 14 years in international education consulting, Ramesh established Abroad Sewa with a mission to make quality overseas education accessible to every Nepali student.

name: Sunita Gurung
bio: Sunita lived and studied in Tokyo for 6 years and brings first-hand experience to every Japan consultation. She speaks fluent Japanese and has a deep network of university contacts.

name: Bikram Thapa
bio: Bikram has processed over 2,000 student visa applications with a 98% success rate. He is an expert in Japanese COE applications and Australian student visas.

name: Priti Shrestha
bio: Priti holds JLPT N1 certification and has taught Japanese language to over 500 students. Her structured teaching method takes students from zero to N3 in under a year.
